collection: format / Spherical 50mm Digital Cinema (action, mixed styles)

clips.title: Cartel Raid
clips.prompt: Shot on a spherical 50mm digital cinema camera, natural perspective, crisp clean pristine imagery, prestige-drama look. Night. A dim warehouse lit by flashlight beams. A person in a police tactical vest sweeps a corner with a raised pistol, breath tight, teammates stacking behind. Dust in the beams, scattered crates, a flickering bulb. Cold clinical light. Precise controlled motion, contemporary drama, 24fps.
